project.name: Gust
project.summary: Gust is a high-performance HTTP framework for Bun and Node.js with portable app primitives, Rust/WASM routing, native server bindings, middleware, docs, benchmarks, and npm packages.
goals: Own the Gust HTTP framework package family, Rust/WASM routing core, native bindings, middleware, examples, docs, and benchmarks.
Keep @sylphx/gust, @sylphx/gust-app, @sylphx/gust-server, @sylphx/gust-core, and NAPI platform packages aligned.
Publish package changes through the central release workflow with native-binding and npm registry proof where relevant.
nonGoals: Own downstream app domain behavior, deployment policy, or product-specific middleware semantics.
Make benchmark claims without reproducible benchmark context.
Treat source revert as complete recovery after npm or native package publication.

owns.name: gust-http-framework
owns.description: Portable app framework, server/native package, Rust/WASM routing core, middleware, streaming, WebSocket, SSE, and examples.

owns.name: gust-package-release
owns.description: Build, test, ADR-29 admission, central release workflow, and native binding package publication.

doesNotOwn: Downstream product apps' domain behavior, databases, auth policy, or deployment paths.
Third-party benchmark environments outside documented benchmark scripts and reports.

publicSurfaces.name: ADR-29 CI and native build workflows

allowedDependencies.surface: ADR-29 admission action and reusable release workflow

forbiddenCouplings: Do not put product-specific application behavior into Gust framework core or middleware.
Do not publish benchmark claims without keeping benchmark scripts and context reproducible.
Do not publish npm/native package changes without CI, release workflow evidence, and registry readback.

delivery.deployPath: Main push runs the central reusable release workflow; NAPI platform publication is delegated to .github/workflows/napi.yml when publish is requested.
delivery.productionProof: ADR-29 admission, CI fan-in, npm registry readback for changed packages, and native binding artifact/readback proof when NAPI packages change.

packageRelease.releaseIntent: Changesets and the central reusable release workflow own package release intent.
packageRelease.versionPr: Version PR and changelog changes are produced by the reusable release workflow.
packageRelease.publisher: SylphxAI/.github reusable release workflow and the repo-local NAPI publish workflow with inherited secrets.
packageRelease.publishProof: npm readback for @sylphx/gust packages and native platform packages when published.

gaps.description: ADR-29 admission currently runs in observe mode; decide when this repo should enforce admission.
Native NAPI package publication should record explicit registry readback and artifact provenance for changed platform packages.
